# Eden Communications
> Strategic PR & Communications for Crypto, Fintech & Frontier Tech

Eden Communications is a strategic public relations firm specializing in
cryptocurrency, fintech, and frontier technology companies. Founded by
Ebony Lewkovitz, former Washington correspondent for the New York Post.

## Services
- Strategic Counsel & Narrative Development
- Earned Media Relations
- Executive Visibility & Stakeholder Engagement
- AI-Powered Media & Market Intelligence

## Team
- Ebony Lewkovitz, Founder
- Larissa Bundziak, Director
- Gabrielle Gomez, Managing Account Supervisor
- Ryan Brack, SVP

## Case Studies
- Ondo Finance: Earned media strategy for the leading tokenized real-world assets protocol. 450+ media placements across Bloomberg, CNBC, Reuters, Fortune, and more. https://edencommunications.com/case-studies/ondo
- Stellar Development Foundation: Strategic communications for the open-source payments network. https://edencommunications.com/case-studies/stellar-development-foundation
- Grip Shipping: PR launch strategy for the AI-powered freight logistics platform. https://edencommunications.com/case-studies/grip-shipping
- Reed Smith On-Chain: Thought leadership positioning for the global law firm's blockchain practice. https://edencommunications.com/case-studies/reed-smith-on-chain
- Franzy: Media relations for the franchise discovery marketplace. https://edencommunications.com/case-studies/franzy
